2026-HP-001 (For Public Hearing) Adopts the “Circle Tower Historic Area Plan - 45” into the Comprehensive Plan for Indianapolis-Marion County. The Plan maps out two interior spaces that make up the historic area located at 55 Monument Circle and provides preservation guidelines and recommendations based on the historic, architectural, and cultural significance of the two interior spaces, which include the first-floor lobby and the second-floor 1930’s historic barber shop.
